4.2.4 V23 Scores 

CMS includes the V23 model scores for the 2019 payment year only (no other year of HCC data that CCW delivers). 
They include distinct HCC condition categories, as well as disease hierarchies. This model is largely V22, but CMS 
modified it to add new HCCs for substance abuse, mental health, and stage three chronic kidney disease
